methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 11 same-sector + similar-valuation-tier peers in Chips & Semiconductors. Range: $1.0B - $23.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 22.3x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: Ouster
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Public), post-money $1.5B

private.name: Aeva Technologies
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Public), post-money $1B+

data.narrative:
Credo Semiconductor, a public-stage chips and semiconductors company, is evaluated against a peer set of 11 same-sector, similar-valuation-tier comparables spanning three public tickers (ALAB, NVDA, AMD) and eight private entities including Cerebras, PsiQuantum, Etched, and SambaNova Systems.

Peer-median valuation anchoring is the primary applicable method, yielding a central estimate of $2.3B. The peer set ranges from $1.0B (floor) to $23.0B (Cerebras, pre-IPO ceiling), with Tenstorrent at $2.7B and SambaNova/Etched both at $5.0B illustrating the dispersion within frontier semiconductor subsegments. Public-comp P/S anchoring, while calculable at a 22.3x sector median across three public semiconductors, cannot be applied here due to absence of target revenue disclosure, a common constraint in private company valuation.

The triangulated range of $2.0B–$2.7B (median $2.3B) reflects a single-method analysis constrained by incomplete financial data. This range is most reliable as a relative positioning tool within the venture-backed semiconductor landscape rather than an absolute estimate. Key uncertainties include undisclosed unit economics, customer concentration, and technology differentiation relative to listed peers. The wide peer range ($1.0B–$23.0B) signals meaningful variation in investor conviction across frontier chip architectures, further limiting precision. Revenue and margin visibility would materially narrow this band.
